questionHtml: Interpret this value of rs in the context of the question.
markschemeHtml:
(A value of rs=-0.671) indicates a negative correlation between a person’s age and the best time they take to run 100 m.          R1

 

Note: Condone any comment that includes “weak” or “strong” etc. Accept an interpretation in words, but only if there is a general link described and not a rule: “The older a person gets, the faster they tend to run”. Answer must be in context.

 

[1 mark]
